programs.title: Fatal Attraction
programs.desc: Someone finds a Detroit trans woman living her truth shot to death one December morning; many suspect a hate crime, and after two witnesses come forward with different stories, detectives must determine which one is telling the truth.

programs.title: For My Man
programs.desc: A young lady is swept off her feet by an older man who spoils her with attention and gifts, but soon learns her new guy is actually the kingpin of an interstate drug operation.

programs.title: For My Man
programs.desc: A young woman joins the police force to provide a better life for her family, then she discovers her husband has been hanging around with some shady characters, and she is desperate to find out more.

programs.title: For My Man
programs.desc: A young beauty catches the eye of a popular Jamaican dance-hall DJ; he gives her a life of luxury, and in return, she gives him undying loyalty and love.

programs.title: A Different World
programs.desc: Dwayne's preoccupation with Whitley affects his grades; Ron and Freddie plan a video.

programs.title: A Different World
programs.desc: Ron considers a career decision; Terrance (Cory Tyler) thinks his father (Glynn Turman) should reject an offer.
